message:
feat(frankenpandas): expose AggFunc + GroupByOptions (fd90.267 / br-f3nrr)

Three fp-groupby user-facing types were unreachable from frankenpandas:

- AggFunc — string-dispatch agg-fn enum used by groupby_agg
- GroupByOptions — groupby config struct
- GroupByExecutionOptions — execution-tuning struct

Replaced the existing single-item `pub use fp_groupby::GroupByError;`
with the 4-item set. The probabilistic data-structure types
(HyperLogLog, CountMinSketch, KllSketch, SketchResult, approx_*) and
the 12 standalone groupby_sum/mean/etc. helper functions are still
internal — file separately if needed.

Verified: 36 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
